result:
**Goal: Add a Smoke & Fire Simulation mode.**

A particle-based fire-and-smoke system where flames burn at configurable source points, heat rises with buoyancy and turbulence, and smoke billows upward while cooling and dispersing. Temperature-mapped color gradients (white-hot → yellow → orange → red → dark smoke → fading gray) would make this visually dramatic in the terminal. This fills a clear gap — the project has falling-sand (gravity down) and fluid dynamics (neutral), but nothing with hot buoyant flow. Presets could include campfire, wildfire spread, and explosion burst.

Want me to build it?
